# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 18 — Total Tax Before Credits (2025)

> Authoritative source: `lines/18.md`. Re-authored 2026-06-14.
>
> **Implementation site:** `computeLine18()` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:17417` (~30 lines; pure addition method).
>
> **Two call sites — both required:**
> - **PRIMARY** at `prepare()` line 1653 (after `computeLine17`, before Form 1116).
> - **SECONDARY** inside `correctLine17ForFtc` at line 17345 (G-new-1 fix — refreshes after FTC correction).
>
> Reads `TaxAndCredits.additionalTaxSchedule2` (Schedule 2 line 3 semantic field — G1 fix 2026-04-18), NOT `alternativeMinimumTax`. No MFS guard needed (transitive inheritance from 16 #1 + 17 #1).

## 1. Direct Inputs

| Input | Source | Backend field | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Form1040.line16` | `computeLine16()` + `wireLine16ToOutputs()` | `TaxAndCredits.tax` | Regular tax + Form 8814 + Form 4972 + Box 3 write-ins. Null treated as zero |
| `Form1040.line17` | `computeLine17()` + `wireLine17ToOutputs()` | `TaxAndCredits.additionalTaxSchedule2` | Schedule 2 line 3 semantic = line 1z + Form 6251 line 11. Currently `line 1z = 0` so equals AMT only, but reading the semantic field is future-safe (G1 fix). Null treated as zero |

## 2. Conditional Inputs

None — line 18 is always computed as `line16 + line17` regardless of filing scenario, AMT presence, or FTC.

## 3. Outputs

| Output field | Model location | Type | Consumer |
|---|---|---|---|
| `TaxAndCredits.totalTaxBeforeCredits` | `form1040.taxAndCredits` | `BigDecimal` | All CLW consumers + Form 1040 line 22 (`line22 = max(0, line18 − line21)`) |

## 4. PDF Fields

| Form | CSV key | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Form 1040 page 2 | `line18_total_tax_add_lines16_17` | Line 18 amount (rect `504,612,576,624`) |

Source: `pdfs/f1040_field_mapping_semantic.csv`.

## 5. Compute Order

```text
Form1040.line15 (taxable income)
    ↓
computeLine16()           →  TaxAndCredits.tax                       (line 16)            at prepare() ~1192
    ↓
computeLine17()           →  TaxAndCredits.alternativeMinimumTax     (= Schedule 2 line 3)
+ wireLine17ToOutputs()   →  TaxAndCredits.additionalTaxSchedule2    (PDF field semantic) at prepare() 1621
    ↓
computeLine18() PRIMARY   →  TaxAndCredits.totalTaxBeforeCredits     (line 18 = line16 + additionalTaxSchedule2)  at prepare() 1653
    ↓
computeForm1116()         →  FTC                                                          (Form 1116 reads pre-refresh totalTaxBeforeCredits — correct)
    ↓
applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()  →  Schedule3.line1 = FTC
    ↓
correctLine17ForFtc() [if FTC > 0]:
    ├── re-computes Form6251.line10 (− FTC), line11
    ├── wireLine17ToOutputs(corrected) → refreshes additionalTaxSchedule2
    └── computeLine18() SECONDARY refresh                                                 at line 17345  ← G-new-1
    ↓
Downstream CLW consumers read REFRESHED TaxAndCredits.totalTaxBeforeCredits:
    ├── finalizeForm2441PartII()      → child/dependent care CLW
    ├── computeForm8880()             → saver's credit CLW line 10
    ├── computeSchedule8812()         → CTC/ODC CLW-A line 1
    ├── computeForm8863()             → education credits CLW
    └── computeForm8839() (partial)   → adoption credit CLW (Schedule 3 line 6c wiring partial)
    ↓
computeLine20ThroughLine24():
    line21 = nz(line19) + nz(line20)
    line22 = max(0, line18 − line21)
    line23 = Schedule2.line21  (other taxes — Part II)
    line24 = line22 + line23   (TOTAL TAX FINAL)
```

## 6. Downstream Consumers

| Consumer | Method | How it uses line 18 |
|---|---|---|
| Form 2441 CLW | `finalizeForm2441PartII()` | CLW line A = `totalTaxBeforeCredits − Schedule3 credits` |
| Form 8880 CLW | `computeForm8880()` | CLW line 10 = `totalTaxBeforeCredits − prior credits` |
| Schedule 8812 CLW-A | `computeSchedule8812()` | CLW line 1 = `totalTaxBeforeCredits` (post-FTC refresh) |
| Form 8863 CLW | `computeForm8863()` | CLW = `totalTaxBeforeCredits − prior credits` |
| Form 1116 CLW | `computeForm1116()` | CLW line 10 = `totalTaxBeforeCredits − prior credits` — **reads BEFORE refresh** (correct; Form 1116 produces the FTC) |
| Form 8839 CLW (partial) | `computeForm8839()` | CLW wiring partial; Schedule 3 line 6c deferred |
| Form 1040 line 22 | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` | `line22 = max(0, line18 − line21)` |

Read-order summary: **Form 1116 reads BEFORE refresh; the other 6 consumers read AFTER refresh** (correct — G-new-1 ensures downstream sees post-FTC-corrected value).

## 7. 2025 Tax Constants

None — line 18 is pure arithmetic. No thresholds, phaseouts, or rates.

## 8. Scope Guardrails

| Guardrail | Enforcement |
|---|---|
| Line 18 is **not total tax** (that is line 24) | Structural — single addition method |
| Line 18 must **not** include Schedule 2 Part II other taxes | Structural — reads `additionalTaxSchedule2` (line 3), not line 21 |
| Line 17 is **not AMT-only** | Reads semantic `additionalTaxSchedule2`, not `alternativeMinimumTax` (G1 fix) |
| Both line 16 and line 17 are non-negative | Structural — guarantees line 18 ≥ 0 |

## 9. Gaps

| Gap | Severity | Status |
|---|---|---|
| G1: `computeLine18()` read `alternativeMinimumTax` instead of `additionalTaxSchedule2` (Schedule 2 line 3). Harmless while `Schedule2.line1z = 0` but future-broken when any 1z item lands | LOW | **Fixed 2026-04-18** |
| G-new-1 (inherited from 17): `totalTaxBeforeCredits` stale after FTC correction in `correctLine17ForFtc` | MEDIUM | **Fixed 2026-04-18** — `computeLine18` SECONDARY call added at line 17345 |
| G-new-5 (inherited from 17): When `additionalTaxSchedule2` is fixed to include `line 1z`, line 18 automatically inherits the corrected value with no `computeLine18` change required | — | **Inheritance-by-design**; no separate fix needed at line 18 |
